# Roadmap

## v0.1
* MVP of provider abstractions (Ollama, OpenAI Compatible).
* Configuration using YAML.
* Heuristic based recommendations of resource boundaries.
* Core CLI for drafting single files and presenting a diff.

## v0.2
* Patch application via CLI with `--apply`.
* Better ranking logic for drafted candidates (choosing between multiple candidates generated by worker models).
* Support for Claude/Anthropic standard endpoints.

## v0.3
* Agentic auto-retry on failed drafts.
* Live code execution boundary (sandboxing) for verification.
